name: RMW - SIG Spear
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Also known as the XM7, its the brand new service rifle of the US Military. Uses a relatively obscure intermediate cratridge, the .277 SIG FURY (6.8x51mm). Its a close relative of the MCX Series. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
